mdSummary:
# EmptyState

Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/empty-state

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| EmptyState | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| EmptyState | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Action | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| EmptyState | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `IconContent` (EmptyState) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.
- `Action` (EmptyState) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<EmptyState />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/EmptyState/EmptyState.razor`
